notes:
EduMelon 0.1.8

- Added first-run interactive tutorial with step-by-step module walkthrough.
- Added demo mode screens for PDF+chatbot, flashcards, and tests with deterministic mock data.
- Added tutorial restart entry in Settings (Help section).
- Added low-spec tests mode toggle in Settings (fewer retries/tokens, optional vision-off path).
- Improved tutorial targeting, lighter overlay, and auto-scroll to highlighted elements.
